name: FlexiSPY
description: Commercial stalkerware with deep device surveillance including call interception, ambient recording, and GPS tracking. Hides from victim.

name: mSpy
description: Commercial stalkerware sold for parental monitoring. Exfiltrates SMS, calls, location, and app activity to remote servers without consent.

name: mSpy Agent
description: mSpy monitoring agent disguised as a system component. Runs persistently in the background to upload device data.

name: Spyic
description: Commercial stalkerware that provides SMS, call log, GPS location, and social media monitoring via a web dashboard.

name: Cocospy
description: Commercial stalkerware sharing infrastructure with Spyic. Stealth mode hides app icon from launcher.

name: Hoverwatch
description: Commercial stalkerware that captures screenshots, records calls, tracks location, and logs keystrokes. Invisible mode available.

name: FamiSafe
description: Parental control / stalkerware hybrid by Wondershare. Tracks real-time GPS, app usage, and browsing history.

name: Spyzie
description: Commercial stalkerware that monitors SMS, calls, WhatsApp, Facebook, and GPS location without the target's knowledge.

name: uMobix
description: Commercial stalkerware with keylogger, social media monitoring, and live GPS tracking capabilities.

name: Eyezy
description: Commercial stalkerware marketed as parental monitoring. Captures keystrokes, reads encrypted messages, and tracks location.

name: iSpyoo
description: Commercial stalkerware that monitors calls, SMS, GPS, and social media. Rebranded variant of TheTruthSpy infrastructure.

name: TheTruthSpy
description: Stalkerware with documented massive data breach. Collects SMS, calls, GPS, photos, and real-time location from victims.

name: Copy9
description: Stalkerware from TheTruthSpy group. Uploads SMS, contacts, WhatsApp messages, and GPS coordinates to remote C2.

name: SpyMaster Pro
description: Commercial stalkerware that hides its icon and silently exfiltrates device data including call recordings and messages.

name: Cerberus Banking Trojan
description: Android banking trojan capable of overlay attacks, SMS interception for 2FA bypass, RAT functionality, and credential theft.

name: Cerberus
description: Cerberus banking trojan variant. Uses Accessibility Services for keylogging and fake overlay screens to steal banking credentials.

name: Anubis Banking Trojan
description: Anubis banking trojan disguised as Google Play Games. Steals banking credentials, intercepts SMS, and has RAT capabilities.

name: BankBot
description: BankBot trojan disguised as Google verification service. Performs overlay attacks against banking apps to steal credentials.

name: EventBot
description: EventBot banking trojan that abuses Android Accessibility Services to steal data from 200+ financial apps and intercept SMS.

name: SharkBot
description: SharkBot banking trojan that performs Automatic Transfer System (ATS) attacks to initiate unauthorized money transfers.

name: SharkBot Dropper
description: SharkBot malware dropper disguised as antivirus application. Was distributed via Google Play Store before removal.

name: BRATA
description: BRATA Android banking trojan with factory reset capability. Intercepts OTPs, overlays banking apps, and wipes devices after fraud.

name: FluBot
description: FluBot (Cabassous) banking trojan spread via smishing. Steals banking credentials, contact lists, and spreads itself via SMS.

name: DroidJack RAT
description: DroidJack (SandroRAT) remote access trojan providing full device control: camera, microphone, SMS, calls, and file system access.

name: AndroRAT
description: AndroRAT open-source remote administration tool. Provides remote control over calls, SMS, GPS, camera, and microphone.

name: SpyNote RAT
description: SpyNote (CypherRat) remote access trojan. Exfiltrates SMS, contacts, call logs, and enables live camera/microphone streaming.

name: SpyMax RAT
description: SpyMax commercial RAT toolkit. Provides keylogging, SMS interception, call recording, GPS tracking, and remote shell.

name: AhMyth RAT
description: AhMyth open-source Android RAT. Steals SMS, contacts, call logs, location data, and captures camera images remotely.

name: Pegasus Indicator (NSO Group)
description: Package name associated with Pegasus spyware by NSO Group per Citizen Lab and Amnesty International research. Zero-click exploit delivery.

name: Pegasus Indicator (NSO Group)
description: Package name impersonating Apple service identified in Pegasus spyware IOC reports. Used to masquerade as legitimate system component.

name: Pegasus Indicator (NSO Group)
description: Package name linked to Pegasus spyware infrastructure identified in Citizen Lab forensic analysis of compromised devices.

name: Pegasus Delivery Vector
description: Trojanized application package used as a Pegasus delivery vector. Masquerades as popular app while installing surveillance implant.

name: Pegasus Persistence Component
description: System update masquerade package associated with advanced persistent spyware implants including Pegasus-related indicators.

name: Pegasus WhatsApp Exploit Indicator
description: Package impersonating WhatsApp update, associated with NSO Group Pegasus delivery following the CVE-2019-3568 WhatsApp exploit.

name: FinFisher / FinSpy
description: FinFisher (FinSpy) commercial spyware sold to governments. Full device takeover including encrypted communications interception.

name: FinSpy Dropper
description: FinFisher spyware dropper masquerading as Adobe Flash Player. Installs surveillance implant with keylogging and call interception.

name: Chrysaor Spyware (Google TAG)
description: Package associated with Chrysaor Android spyware (Pegasus Android cousin) documented by Google and Lookout Security.

name: Predator Spyware Indicator
description: Package name pattern associated with Cytrox Predator spyware per Citizen Lab and Meta threat intelligence reporting.

name: GinMaster Trojan
description: GinMaster trojan disguised as Google Play Services update. Roots device, installs backdoor, and exfiltrates device identifiers.

name: DroidDream Trojan
description: DroidDream malware family that exploits CVE-2010-EASY root exploit. Exfiltrates IMEI, IMSI, and installs additional payloads.

name: Marcher Banking Trojan
description: Marcher banking trojan that performs overlay attacks on banking and payment apps to steal credentials and credit card data.

name: Marcher Variant
description: Marcher banking trojan variant impersonating Google Play Services. Monitors app launches and overlays fake login screens.

name: SpyPhone Android
description: Consumer-grade stalkerware that logs SMS, calls, and GPS. Uploaded to public trackers and third-party stores.

name: Mobile Tracker Free
description: Stalkerware marketed for parental and employee monitoring. Identified by EXODUS Privacy as exfiltrating data without transparent disclosure.

name: Wspy
description: Commercial stalkerware with WhatsApp, Viber, and Snapchat message interception. Variant of iSpyoo/TheTruthSpy infrastructure.

name: PhoneMonitor
description: Consumer stalkerware agent providing silent SMS, call, and GPS monitoring. Installs without clear consent disclosure to target device owner.

name: KidsGuard Pro
description: KidsGuard Pro by ClevGuard. Monitors WhatsApp, Snapchat, Instagram, records calls, and tracks GPS with hidden operation mode.

name: ClevGuard Agent
description: ClevGuard monitoring agent. Part of stalkerware infrastructure flagged by Google Play Store for policy violations.

name: SpyHuman
description: SpyHuman stalkerware that intercepts calls, SMS, WhatsApp, and monitors browsing history without target awareness.

name: Spyera
description: Commercial stalkerware with ambient listening, call interception, encrypted communication monitoring, and keylogging capabilities.

name: Highster Mobile
description: Commercial stalkerware that exfiltrates SMS, GPS location, call logs, photos, and social media messages.

name: Auto Forward SMS
description: SMS forwarding stalkerware that silently redirects all inbound and outbound SMS to attacker-controlled numbers or emails.

name: SpyBubble
description: SpyBubble commercial stalkerware. Tracks GPS, monitors calls and SMS, and exfiltrates WhatsApp and social media messages.

name: NexSpy
description: NexSpy stalkerware with GPS tracking, SMS/call monitoring, and social media interception. Identified by Kaspersky threat research.

name: XNSPY
description: Commercial stalkerware marketed for parental monitoring. Monitors calls, SMS, emails, GPS, and social media apps covertly.

name: Moniterro
description: Moniterro stalkerware with screen recording, keylogging, and social media monitoring. Hides from app drawer.

name: Joker Spyware
description: Joker (Bread) malware family disguised as utility app. Subscribes victims to premium SMS services and exfiltrates contact data.

name: Joker Variant
description: Joker malware variant. Removed from Google Play Store multiple times. Performs WAP billing fraud and SMS interception.

name: xHelper Dropper
description: xHelper persistent Android trojan dropper. Reinstalls itself even after factory reset by abusing device partition mounts.

name: HummingBad
description: HummingBad malware that roots devices, installs fraudulent apps, and generates $300k/month in fraudulent ad revenue.

name: Gooligan
description: Gooligan campaign malware that roots Android devices, steals Google authentication tokens, and installs fraudulent apps.

name: SMSSpy
description: SMS spy agent that silently forwards all SMS messages to attacker-controlled endpoint. Used in targeted surveillance campaigns.

name: Triout Spyware
description: Triout Android spyware framework that records calls, logs SMS, captures images, and records video, uploading to C2 server.

name: FakeApp Accessibility Abuse
description: Malware abusing Android Accessibility Services disguised as TalkBack update to perform keylogging and UI interaction monitoring.

name: AndroSpy
description: AndroSpy commercial RAT available on underground forums. Full device control including live camera, microphone, and GPS streaming.

name: CometRAT
description: CometRAT Android remote access trojan. Exfiltrates device data, enables remote shell, and intercepts communications.

name: BlackShades Mobile
description: BlackShades Android RAT variant. Provides remote access to device camera, microphone, file system, and messaging apps.

name: GinMaster Root Exploit
description: GinMaster malware that exploits rooting vulnerabilities to install persistent backdoor and steal device identifiers.

name: Dendroid RAT
description: Dendroid Android RAT sold on underground forums. Intercepts calls/SMS, activates camera/microphone, and performs HTTP flooding.

name: Dvmap Trojan
description: Dvmap Android trojan that patches system libraries to inject malicious code. First Android malware to inject code into system runtime.

name: WhatsApp Mod Malware
description: Malicious WhatsApp modification that bundles Triada/Trojan downloader. Distributed through unofficial channels.

name: Triada Trojan
description: Triada modular Android trojan that embeds into Zygote process. Pre-installed on some low-cost Android devices from supply chain compromise.

name: Hermit Spyware (RCS Lab)
description: Hermit enterprise spyware by RCS Lab documented by Lookout and Google TAG. Used by government entities against journalists and activists.

name: Predator Spyware (Cytrox)
description: Predator spyware by Cytrox/Intellexa. Documented by Citizen Lab and Meta. Used against politicians and journalists via zero-click exploits.

name: DevilsTongue (Candiru)
description: Candiru spyware tool documented by Citizen Lab and Microsoft. Android component of cross-platform surveillance product.

name: StageFright Exploit Dropper
description: Malware exploiting CVE-2015-1538 (StageFright) via malicious MMS. Delivers payload upon receipt of crafted multimedia message.

name: Agent Smith Malware
description: Agent Smith malware that replaces legitimate apps with malicious versions by exploiting Android package installation vulnerabilities.

name: Vultur Banking Trojan
description: Vultur Android banking trojan that uses VNC screen recording to capture banking app credentials in real time.

name: Hook Banking Trojan
description: Hook Android banking trojan (ERMAC fork). Captures credentials from 700+ banking and cryptocurrency apps via overlay attacks.

name: ERMAC Banking Trojan
description: ERMAC Android banking trojan targeting 467 banking and wallet apps. Intercepts 2FA codes and performs wallet seed phrase theft.

name: Hydra Banking Trojan
description: Hydra banking trojan that requests dangerous permissions and uses Accessibility Services to steal banking credentials and bypass 2FA.

name: Spynger
description: Spynger stalkerware marketed for partner monitoring. Tracks GPS, intercepts WhatsApp and Telegram, and records calls covertly.

name: Minspy
description: Minspy stalkerware sharing backend infrastructure with Spyic/Cocospy. Exfiltrates device data to shared server infrastructure.

name: TeenSafe
description: TeenSafe parental monitoring app that exposed credentials of thousands of accounts. Classified as stalkerware by AV vendors.

name: Stealth Phone Spy
description: Consumer stalkerware with stealth operation mode. Logs all device activity and transmits to remote dashboard without user indication.

description: TheTruthSpy stalkerware — if not self-installed, contact a DV hotline

description: mSpy stalkerware disguised as framework update — if not self-installed, contact a DV hotline

description: Cocospy/FoneMonitor stalkerware — if not self-installed, contact a DV hotline
